textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: A wall-mounted decorative cascade of solid gold coins pouring from a stone spout like a frozen waterfall, coins fused together in a rigid solid mass flowing down a dark stone wall, game prop, isolated object, dark background, side orientation view

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Bright gold coins fused into solid cascade, each coin distinct with goat stamps, dark stone wall mount, metallic gold reflections
